description: Stateful negative: a hotel booking is abandoned (would be a loop mid-session), but the user returns 50 minutes later and completes checkout. Final state must contain zero loops — a transient candidate must be retracted on the completion signal.

observations.screen_text: Jul 10 - Jul 13 · Ocean View Hotel $189/night · Sea Blue Inn $164/night

Payment details · Visa ending 4821 · Complete booking

must_not_detect: the hotel booking as a loop at session end — it was completed at observation 4; a transient candidate created around 12:05-12:55 must be retracted
